close_reason: Completed durability/graduation epic: documented ownership boundaries, verified runtime_module/0, proved app-owned file-backed hibernate/thaw, and stated no V3 durable transcript storage.
description:
Purpose: make the persistence boundary honest and useful.

Done when:
- users understand when sessions stop being enough
- the graduation path is tested or explicitly documented as a runtime concern
- no public API implies session persistence unless it exists
title: V3 E16: Durability and graduation
